prerequisites: An active BlueTally account with access to the account Settings page.
A BlueTally API key created from Settings > API Keys (the api_key field, required).
A start_date value marking the earliest date from which to replicate records (the start_date field, required).

authMethods.name: API Key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: BlueTally authenticates with a single API key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. BlueTally uses the key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>) on every request.

setupSteps.title: Create a BlueTally API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to BlueTally, click the profile icon in the top right corner and select Settings. In the left navigation bar click API Keys, then click Create API Key to generate a key. Copy the key immediately and keep it secure, since BlueTally uses it as a Bearer token.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated key into the required api_key field. The connector sends it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header when calling the BlueTally API.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Enter a value in the required start_date field. The connector uses this as the earliest point from which to pull records on the initial sync.

sources.title: BlueTally API - Getting Started With Your API (authentication, creating an API key, Bearer token)
